labs.clinicalContext: Monitor for progression or improvement of microalbuminuria during ACE inhibitor therapy in diabetic CKD patients

labRequirements.sourceSnippet: ACEi/ARB microalbuminuria trial cluster extension: 10 additional RCTs from page 119 (refs 41-48, 51, 52) extending the Cochrane ref 15 corpus. Nankervis 1998 (perindopril), O'Hare 2000 (ramipril), Parving 1989 (captopril), Ravid 1993 (ACEi), Romero 1993 (ACEi), Sano 1994 (enalapril), Tong 2006 (fosinopril), Phillips 1993 (cilazapril), Perrin 2008 (candesartan), Tan 2002 (AIIRA).
